review_notes: Six-silhouette check run against the approved arkady silhouette (only other package produced so far): clearly distinct. Arkady reads tall/narrow/vertical with arms tucked to the body; Gennady reads short/broad — 24px shoulders vs arkady's 17px, a forward-tipped wedge torso, and a forearm extended clear of the silhouette in both standing and seated frames. No confusion between the two at a glance. Re-run this check against sasha/galina/lev/nikolai once they exist.
